observations: Clean module separation — image_storage.py handles all persistence logic
Path traversal protection in serve_image endpoint using is_relative_to()
Proper data URI parsing with regex and MIME type handling
External URL download uses httpx with timeout
Placeholder URLs handled gracefully (stored in DB without local file)
Images table schema is clean with appropriate foreign key
10 backend tests cover: data URI PNG/JPEG, external URL download, placeholder handling, multiple images, API serving, 404, path traversal, session images endpoint, empty images
2 frontend tests cover: images tab rendering, empty state
Good use of mocks for httpx download

nonBlockingObservations.description: mimetypes import in main.py is inside the file body rather than at the top. Minor style issue.
Image file written synchronously via file_path.write_bytes() — could use aiofiles for true async IO, but acceptable for this use case since images are typically small.
